name: Network Security Controls
description: Maintain network security controls that restrict and manage traffic to cardholder data environments.

name: Stored Account Data Protection
description: Protect stored account data using safeguards that reduce exposure and misuse.

name: Access by Business Need to Know
description: Restrict access to system components and data based on business need and job responsibility.

name: User Identification and Authentication
description: Use strong user identification and authentication practices for system access.

name: Audit Log Review
description: Review audit logs and security events so suspicious or unauthorized activity can be identified.

name: Third-Party Service Provider Oversight
description: Manage third-party providers with defined responsibilities and oversight for security obligations.
